title: Avoid using Random methods for integer generation
description: Generating random floating point values to cast them into integers is inefficient. A random bounded integer value can be generated with a single proper method call. Use nextInt to make the code more efficient and the intent clearer.
recommendation: Use nextInt instead of methods that return floating point values

noncompliant:
Random r = new Random();
int rand = (int) (r.nextDouble() * 50);
compliant:
Random r = new Random();
int rand = r.nextInt(50);

checks.message: Use nextInt instead of methods that return floating point values
